TagPngChunk - Enum in png
Enumerates PNG chunk types as tag representations that can be used in TIFF-style metadata processing.
TagPngChunk(ChunkType) - Constructor for enum png.TagPngChunk
Constructs a new TagPngChunk instance wrapping the specified PNG chunk type.
TagRegistry - Class in tif.tagspecs
A central repository for mapping numerical Tag IDs and their associated DirectoryIdentifier to Taggable enum constants.
TagRegistry() - Constructor for class tif.tagspecs.TagRegistry
 
TagValueConverter - Class in tif
Utility class for converting DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD values into human-readable or numeric forms.
TagValueConverter() - Constructor for class tif.TagValueConverter
Default constructor will always throw an exception.

Sets the target directory where copied image files are saved to.

Utility method to dump all properties using the Adobe XMP SDK (XMPCore library).

text - Variable in class png.PngChunkZTXT
 
text - Variable in class png.TextEntry
 
textDataOffset - Variable in class png.PngChunkITXT
 
TextEntry - Class in png
Represents a textual metadata entry within a PNG textual chunk, consisting of a chunk type, keyword, and associated text value.
TextEntry(ChunkType, String, String) - Constructor for class png.TextEntry
Constructs a TextEntry with a PNG chunk type, keyword, and associated text value.
TextKeyword - Enum in png
Enumerates standard and common PNG textual metadata keywords found in tEXt, iTXt, and zTXt chunks.
TextKeyword(String) - Constructor for enum png.TextKeyword
 
TextKeyword(String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum png.TextKeyword
 
TextualChunk - Interface in png
Common interface for PNG textual metadata chunks (tEXt, zTXt, iTXt).
TextUpdater - Class in batch
This is the main console batch executor used for copying media files and updating metadata.
TextUpdater() - Constructor for class batch.TextUpdater
 
tif - package tif
Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.
tif.tagspecs - package tif.tagspecs
 
TIFF_BIG_VERSION - Static variable in class tif.IFDHandler
 
TIFF_STANDARD_VERSION - Static variable in class tif.IFDHandler
 
TiffDatePatcher - Class in tif
Performs in-place "surgical patching" of specific timestamp entries.
TiffDatePatcher() - Constructor for class tif.TiffDatePatcher
Default constructor is unsupported and will always throw an exception.
TifFieldType - Enum in tif
An enumeration class of data format types defined in the TIFF specification 6.0 document.
TifFieldType(int, String, int) - Constructor for enum tif.TifFieldType
 
TifMetadata - Class in tif
A container for storing information on extracted TIFF-based metadata, including EXIF and XMP segments.
TifMetadata() - Constructor for class tif.TifMetadata
Constructs an empty metadata container.
TifMetadata(ByteOrder) - Constructor for class tif.TifMetadata
Constructs a new TifMetadata object with the specified byte order for interpreting multi-byte raw data correctly.
TifMetadataProvider - Interface in tif
Provides an specialised interface for accessing and managing TIFF-based metadata structures.
TifParser - Class in tif
A concrete implementation of AbstractImageParser for extracting metadata from TIFF files.
TifParser(Path) - Constructor for class tif.TifParser
Creates an instance intended for parsing the specified TIFF image file.
TifParser(String) - Constructor for class tif.TifParser
Creates an instance for parsing the specified TIFF image file.
toDouble(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Retrieves 8 bytes from the byte array and returns the result as a double value, based on the current byte ordering.
toDouble(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Retrieves 8 bytes from the byte array and returns the result as a double value, based on the current byte ordering.
toDoubleArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for converting an entire byte array to a double array using the specified byte order.
toDoubleArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to an array of 64-bit double values, honouring the specified byte order.
toFloat(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Interprets 4 bytes from the specified position in the array as a 32-bit float, honouring the specified byte order.
toFloat(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Interprets 4 bytes from the specified position in the array as a 32-bit float, adhering to the given byte order.
toFloatArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for converting an entire byte array to a float array using the specified byte order.
toFloatArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to an array of 32-bit float values, honouring the specified byte order.
toHex(byte[]) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to a hexadecimal string representation.
toHexTable(long[]) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Generates a hexadecimal table for debugging long arrays.
toInteger(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads four bytes from the specified byte array and returns the result as a signed integer (32-bit) value, based on the current byte ordering.
toInteger(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads four bytes from the specified byte array and returns the result as a signed integer (32-bit) value, based on the current byte ordering.
toIntegerArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for converting an entire byte array to an integer array using the specified byte order.
toIntegerArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to an array of signed 32-bit integers, honouring the specified byte order.
toLong(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads a 64-bit signed long value (8 bytes) from the specified byte array, interpreting the bytes based on the current byte ordering.
toLong(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads a 64-bit signed long value (8 bytes) from the specified byte array, interpreting the bytes based on the current byte ordering.
toLongArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for converting an entire byte array to a signed 64-bit long integer array, using the specified byte order.
toLongArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to an array of signed 64-bit long integers, honouring the specified byte order.
toNumericValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD) - Static method in class tif.TagValueConverter
Validates and returns the entry data as a Number.
toRational(byte[], ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts 8 bytes into a RationalNumber, using signed or unsigned type.
toRational(byte[], int, ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads an 8-byte segment from the specified byte array at the given offset and converts it into a RationalNumber object.
toRationalArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array into an array of RationalNumber objects, interpreting each 8-byte segment as a numerator-denominator pair.
toShort(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Returns a signed 16-bit short based on the specified two bytes of data.
toShort(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Returns a signed 16-bit short based on the specified two bytes of data.
toSimpleString(boolean) - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
Returns the string representation of the rational number, favouring a simple integer if the value is a whole number.
toString() - Method in class batch.MediaFile
Returns a multi-line string representation of this MediaFile instance, listing its fields for debugging or logging.
toString() - Method in class png.ChunkHandler
Returns a textual representation of all parsed PNG chunks in this file.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunk
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkITXT
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkTEXT
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkTIME
 
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkZTXT
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngDirectory
Returns a string representation of this directory, which is the concatenation of the string representations of all contained PngChunk objects, each on a new line.
toString() - Method in class png.PngMetadata
Generates a string representation of the PNG metadata, listing all categories and their associated directory contents.
toString() - Method in enum png.TagPngChunk
Returns a string representation of the tag, including the enum name and chunk type.
toString() - Method in class png.TextEntry
Returns a formatted string representation of this text entry.
toString() - Method in class tif.DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
Generates a human-readable summary of the entry, suitable for logging or metadata inspection.
toString() - Method in class tif.DirectoryIFD
Generates a formatted string showing current values of every IFD entry in the collection.
toString() - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
 
toString() - Method in class webp.WebpChunk
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class webp.WebpHandler
Returns a string summary of all parsed chunks.
toString() - Method in class webp.WebpHandlerOrig
Returns a textual representation of all parsed WebP chunks in this file.
toString() - Method in class xmp.XmpDirectory
Returns a string representation of this directory, which is the concatenation of the string representations of all contained XmpDirectory.XmpRecord objects, each on a new line.
toString() - Method in class xmp.XmpDirectory.XmpRecord
Returns a string representation of this XmpDirectory.XmpRecord object.
toStringValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD) - Static method in class tif.TagValueConverter
Converts an DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD entry into a human-readable string.
toTextEntry() - Method in class png.PngChunkITXT
Extracts a keyword-text pair from the iTXt chunk.
toTextEntry() - Method in class png.PngChunkTEXT
Extracts a keyword-text pair from the tEXt chunk.
toTextEntry() - Method in class png.PngChunkZTXT
Extracts a de-compressed keyword-text pair from this zTXt chunk.
toTextEntry() - Method in interface png.TextualChunk
Converts this chunk into a keyword-text pair.
toUnsignedInteger(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer value (4 bytes) from the given byte array, interpreting the bytes based on the current byte ordering.
toUnsignedInteger(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer value (4 bytes) from the given byte array, interpreting the bytes based on the current byte ordering.
toUnsignedShort(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Returns an unsigned 16-bit short based on the specified two bytes of data.
toUnsignedShort(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Returns an unsigned 16-bit short based on the specified two bytes of data.
toUnsignedShortArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for converting an entire byte array to an integer array using the specified byte order.
toUnsignedShortArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to an array of unsigned 16-bit integers, honouring the specified byte order.
